cards.name: Checkmate Early Warning
cards.falsifier: A real receipt, screenshot, test, or operator observation contradicts this review.
cards.stopCondition: Stop if Codexa returns work without Checkmate evidence.
cards.nextAction: Run the next smallest proof loop.

cards.name: Orange Judge
cards.falsifier: A real receipt, screenshot, test, or operator observation contradicts this review.
cards.finalVerdict: Prioritize the smallest useful loop that proves the command surface.
cards.whatMatters: A live project loop with visible state and receipts.
cards.cut: Cut decorative panels, fake telemetry, and unproven model claims.
cards.fakeComplexity: Any watcher that does not produce a card, receipt, or blocker is theater.
cards.nextAction: Pick one node, one owner, one validation command.

cards.name: Mirrors
cards.falsifier: A real receipt, screenshot, test, or operator observation contradicts this review.
cards.inferred: The work likely involves real execution.
cards.speculative: Claims about model quality remain speculative until local probes and receipts exist.
cards.nextAction: Attach paths and mark assumptions before calling it complete.

cards.name: Misfits / Rebels
cards.falsifier: A real receipt, screenshot, test, or operator observation contradicts this review.
cards.finalVerdict: The high-upside move is a watcher party line that critiques the DAG before work scales.
cards.frontierCard: Turn each review engine into a standing critic with structured cards, not a chat persona.
cards.antiGenericMove: Make the project refuse generic 'looks good' responses.
cards.experimentPath: Run review engines against one current node, compare before/after plan quality.
cards.canonBoundary: Experimental ideas must stay labeled until Mirrors and Checkmate prove them.
cards.nextAction: Add watcher cards to Opus awareness and the command surface.

cards.name: Lips
cards.falsifier: A real receipt, screenshot, test, or operator observation contradicts this review.
cards.finalVerdict: This will feel mechanical unless UX language is added.
cards.wording: Use short, decisive labels and visible next actions.
cards.interaction: Every critique card needs approve/reject/use-later affordances.
cards.emotionalLanding: Operator should feel control, not dashboard fatigue.
cards.nextAction: Show the watcher verdicts as premium cards, not raw text.

cards.name: Hack The Planet
cards.falsifier: A real receipt, screenshot, test, or operator observation contradicts this review.
cards.finalVerdict: Execution path exists but needs a shorter unblock loop.
cards.shortestUnblock: Run the smallest safe command that proves or falsifies the claim.
cards.patchPlan: Convert the next action into a DAG node with owner, command, expected evidence.
cards.fallbackPath: If Codexa rail fails, write packet to shared folder and keep cockpit responsive.
cards.nextAction: Generate a command packet, then Checkmate it.

nextAction: Run the next smallest proof loop.
